name: ASUS PRIME A620-PLUS WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 4x PCIe 3.0 x16 - Support DDR5-7200(OC) - 2x M.2 Slots - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.4 - USB 3.2 Gen1 Type-C+A - Realtek GbE LAN - Wi-Fi 5 802.11ac - BT 5.0
